subject: Flexi-Work Arrangement (FWA) - WFH Request - Tammy Choo Min Li

content.answer:
Hi Shuning,

We have a request from an employee seeking an ad hoc request to the current
working arrangements.

Below is the requested work arrangement, for your review and approval:

Employee Email: tammy.chooml@shopee.com

Employee Name: Tammy Chooml

*Team: *Regional Cross Border - BPM

FWA Duration Type: Ad hoc

*Dates that Employee Needs to WFH:* 17-21 March 2025

Reason(s) for requested FWA: employee is currently hospitalized after
surgery, while she is able to resume work remotely next week in the
hospital when her condition improves, as aligned with employee's reporting
manager, 1 week WFH arrangement won't impact the daily work as the
stakeholders are mostly overseas and the communications are usually done
online.

Thank you!


*Best regards*
*Max Xuyue*
